title: thelypteris qinlingensis
intro: Thelypteris qinlingensis, also known as Qinling fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris qinlingensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris qinlingensis is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tonics that promote overall well-being and vitality.
